200.description: Collection of a pricing tables offers.

SizePage.description: Maximum number of items to return.

Count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

TotalItems.description: Total number of items matching the request (across all pages).

items.description: A representation of a pricing table offer

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdPricingTable.description: Id of the PricingTable related to the PricingTableOffer.

IdOffer.description: Id of the Offer related to the PricingTableOffer.

Order.description: Define the position of the Offer among all Offers in the PricingTable when displayed in the hosted pages.

items.title: PricingTableOffer

204.description: No results. Response body is Empty

401.description: Invalid or no credentials passed in the request

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

403.description: The operation cannot be processed. The response contains a JSON error object with more information
